# Cold Email Template

## Version 1

Subject: quick website idea for {{business_name}}

Hi {{first_name}},

I came across {{business_name}} and noticed you have a presence on {{platform_or_listing}}, but not a strong standalone website yet.

I build simple, professional websites for small businesses like yours so customers can quickly find your services, hours, location, and contact information in one place.

I put together a concept based on publicly listed business information to show what a clean site for {{business_name}} could look like. If you want, I can send it over or walk you through it in 10 minutes.

If now is not a fit, no problem. Just reply "no thanks" and I will not follow up.

{{your_name}}
{{business_name_sender}}
{{phone}}
{{email}}
{{website}}

## Version 2

Subject: noticed {{business_name}} could use a simple website

Hi {{first_name}},

I help local businesses get online fast with clean, mobile-friendly websites.

I noticed {{business_name}} is active online, but customers still have to piece together information from listings and social media. That usually means missed calls and weaker first impressions.

If helpful, I can send a simple website concept for your business and explain what it would take to launch it.

If you are not interested, reply "pass" and I will close the loop.

{{your_name}}

## Rules for Every Email

- be honest,
- do not pretend you are already working for them,
- do not use deceptive subject lines,
- include an opt-out line,
- keep the message short.
